products.name: Frollini
pros: High fiber content from whole grain flour
Low sugar and no artificial additives
Positive consumer ratings in Altroconsumo lab tests

products.name: Carrefour Bio

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025‑05‑22 report ranks Frollini and Carrefour Bio among the best biscotti, citing laboratory tests, consumer feedback and price‑quality balance.
